ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully handling a nut and bolt.  The robot's movements should be precise and deliberate, reflecting the task's detail. Frame 1 shows both arms extended forward, palms up, as if ready to receive the nut and bolt. Frame 2 shows the right arm holding the nut and the left arm holding the bolt. Frame 3 shows the right arm positioning the nut onto the bolt held by the left arm. Frame 4 shows the right arm tightening the nut onto the bolt. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to a neutral, resting position.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms up, ready to work
left arm holds the bolt, right arm grasps the nut
right arm brings the nut to meet the bolt
right arm tightens the nut with a firm twist
arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
